packets.environment: River settlements define movement, risk, and belonging. "Webb and Gregory. \"The Caddo Indians of Louisiana.\"...
packets.socialOrder: Alexis, Augustin read rank through who speaks first, who waits, and who is trusted to carry unfinished news.
packets.materialLife: Wet cane, ash, stored grain, woven reed, and smoke-stung cloth keep everyone inside the same practical economy of effort.
packets.movementPatterns: People move between bank, cook fire, and council edge in loops that reveal allegiance without needing a declaration.
packets.laborRitualGovernanceCues: Work and ritual are not separate tracks here; oath language, food allocation, and witness order all function as local governance.
packets.obviousToCharacters: Everyone knows debt, weather, and kin obligation can shift status before sundown, so speech stays careful and short.
packets.notConsciouslyExplained: No one pauses to explain why a silence matters; the body already knows when danger enters the room.
